title: AuditEvent
description: Wire-format projection of one row in the andy-policies audit chain (P6). See docs/audit-envelope.md.

id.description: Stable random GUID assigned at write time.

seq.description: Database-assigned monotonic sequence; not part of the hash envelope.

prevHashHex.description: SHA-256 of the previous row's hash; 64 zero chars for the genesis row.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 with millisecond precision and Z suffix.

actorSubjectId.description: JWT sub claim of the actor.

actorRoles.description: RBAC roles snapshot. Sorted lex order before hashing.

entityType.description: Canonical type of the mutated entity.

entityId.description: String form of the mutated row's primary key.

fieldDiff.description: RFC 6902 JSON Patch document; embedded as a JSON array, not a JSON-encoded string. Defaults to [] for create/delete events.

rationale.description: Free-text rationale; null permitted only when andy.policies.rationaleRequired is off (P6.4).
